company.name: Hughes Ventilation Air Conditioning Ltd
company.address: HVAC, Unit 1, City South Business Park, Bankhead Drive, Portlethen, Aberdeen, AB12 4XX, Scotland
company.mission: To offer clients top-class service, practical engineered bespoke solutions, using quality, certified materials, installed by qualified personnel at competitive market costs.
company.summary: Aberdeen-based HVAC engineering for onshore, offshore and marine projects. The company combines ventilation, refrigeration, testing, insulation, fabrication, commissioning and project management capability for demanding industrial environments.

services.title: HVAC systems
services.summary: Ventilation and heating solutions for offshore and onshore applications.
services.body: Hughes designs and supplies HVAC systems using proven equipment and practical offshore experience. Typical applications include accommodation ventilation, switch room ventilation, transformer cooling, SCR cooling, mud-pit extraction, shale-shaker extract, engine-room ventilation, draw-works cooling and bespoke hazardous-area ventilation.

services.title: Refrigeration
services.summary: Custom-built offshore refrigeration systems for harsh marine environments.
services.body: The company supplies complete cooling installations for hazardous and non-hazardous areas. Offshore refrigeration systems are custom-built, factory tested and designed for platforms and vessels.

services.title: PFEER / TR testing
services.summary: Temporary Refuge porosity testing against smoke, fumes and noxious gas infiltration.
services.body: HVAC carries out Temporary Refuge testing to help clients evaluate TR spaces against relevant safety requirements. Final standards wording and test scope should be confirmed with the client for each project.

services.title: LEV testing
services.summary: Local exhaust ventilation testing to support COSHH compliance.
services.body: LEV testing helps employers confirm that extraction systems keep exposure to hazardous substances within safe limits. HVAC provides testing and reporting for industrial and workshop environments.

services.title: Acoustic and thermal insulation
services.summary: Sound absorption and thermal insulation packages for industrial and marine projects.
services.body: The technical team supplies acoustic and thermal insulation products intended to improve comfort, control noise and protect operational environments.

services.title: Air balancing and commissioning
services.summary: System balancing, commissioning, fan-speed inverter setup and documentation.
services.body: Engineers commission AHU and general ventilation systems, confirm air-change rates, set up pressure feedback control and hand over operation and maintenance information with test data.

services.title: Duct cleaning and sterilisation
services.summary: Ventilation ductwork cleaning and sterilisation to support air quality and health standards.
services.body: HVAC cleans and sterilises ductwork for industrial and marine ventilation systems. Final method statements should be confirmed for each site and operating environment.

engineering.title: Survey
engineering.text: Offshore and quayside mechanical and electrical surveys, with findings and recommendations documented for project teams.

engineering.title: Design
engineering.text: Engineering designs, detailed CAD drawings and work packs covering HSE requirements and technical scope.

engineering.title: Procurement
engineering.text: Procurement of equipment and materials, with quality and certification requirements controlled for project delivery.

engineering.title: Fabrication
engineering.text: General rig repairs, fabrication and welding capabilities to support installation and modification work.

engineering.title: Installation
engineering.text: Installation of new equipment and repairs to existing systems across onshore, offshore and marine environments.

engineering.title: Commissioning
engineering.text: Systems checks, pre-commissioning, final commissioning and handover documentation.

certifications.title: COSHH aligned LEV testing
certifications.text: LEV testing supports employer duties under Control of Substances Hazardous to Health regulations.

certifications.title: PFEER / TR testing
certifications.text: Temporary Refuge testing evaluates porosity against infiltration of smoke, fumes and noxious gases.

certifications.title: Factory-tested refrigeration systems
certifications.text: Research notes that offshore refrigeration systems are custom-built and factory tested.
